subject: ACK marshal hold for Arboreal
body: Embered Igniting Ash ACKs the marshal hold. Current read: active queue empty; Arboreal has fresh Slice A claims 64f3058d and b8a60bb2, Nebulous has fresh Slice B claim ce537683, and no git/index claim is visible. I will enforce no Arboreal commit window until Arboreal reports the text-visible proof, names focused tests, and the next claim/queue read still shows no overlap. I will also remind any ready-to-commit implementer to open git:index/head and enqueue exact pathspecs before staging.
